frame_analyses.description: Gauze suspended between four clamps with circular pattern marked, instruments positioned
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial setup, gauze properly tensioned

frame_analyses.description: Right scissors beginning initial cut at top of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean entry point, scissors perpendicular to gauze

frame_analyses.description: Continuing cut clockwise around circle, approximately 1/4 complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady progression, maintaining distance from line

frame_analyses.description: Halfway around circle, cutting along right side
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tension maintenance, clean cut line

frame_analyses.description: Three-quarters complete, approaching bottom of circle
Nearly complete circle, final section being cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Approaching completion, gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut completed, center portion separated
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion, no jagged edges visible

frame_analyses.description: Final positioning showing completed cut circle

penalties.description: Minor deviations from marked line at multiple points

confidence_rationale: Good overall visualization of cutting technique and completion. Some difficulty in precisely measuring deviations due to camera angle and gauze texture making exact line boundaries challenging to assess.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at some cardinal points due to oblique camera angle
Precise assessment of very minor deviations less than 1mm
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth, controlled cutting technique. Completed well within expert time range with minimal deviations from the marked line.
strengths: Exceptional time efficiency (63s vs 90s expert upper bound)
Clean, complete circle cut with no jagged edges
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining exact distance from line at cardinal points
Slight adjustment needed at south position where deviation was highest
